global.description: The ad features a dark background with a central focus on food icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting quick dinner options with a discount.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that provides contrast for the text and elements.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'BiteRush' in a bold font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: food icons
elements.description: Three stylized food icons representing meals, arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: dinner offer text
elements.description: Text in a large, bold font stating 'Dinner in minutes' centered below the food icons.

elements.label: additional offer text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main offer that reads 'Late-night deals available'.

elements.label: discount badge
elements.description: A prominent badge displaying '-30%' in a bold font, indicating a discount.

elements.label: learn more button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Learn more' in a contrasting color, inviting action.

elements.label: decorative lines
elements.description: Thin decorative lines or borders that enhance the visual appeal of the ad.

elements.label: sale announcement
elements.description: Text reading 'SALE' in a bold font, positioned at the top right.

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: An unidentified element that does not contribute to the main message.
